title: Survival Mod
description: This mod adds, new Recipies that are toggleble; New Structures; New Command like /toggle or /survival.
body:
# Survival Mod
This mod adds small but useful features to enhance the survival experience.
## Commands
### /survival
The ```/survival``` command can be used to display short text outputs. 

For example:
```
/survival info
```
### /toggle
The ```/toggle``` command allows you to display certain statistics in multiple formats.
You can also customize the color for each user.
```
/toggle stone actionbar
```
This will show the selected statistic just above your hotbar.
To change the color of the display, use:
```
/toggle color number GREEN
```
This sets the number color to lime green.
Another available option is:
```
/toggle timeplayed
```
This will show the total time you've spent on this world or server above the hotbar.

**Note for Server Owners:**
The playtime is retrieved from the player's statistics. Clearing these stats will reset the displayed time.
## New Structures
This mod adds a variety of new structures—some small, some large.
## New Recipies
This mod includes a few useful recipe additions.
Highlights are:
- Smelt raw ore blocks into regular ore blocks using a blast furnace
- Craft light blocks using a torch and eight glass panes
- Use a stonecutter on light blocks to adjust their light levels
- Craft large grass and large ferns from two small grass or two small ferns, respectively
## Dependancy
This Mod needs [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to function

## Why Are There Versions a and b?
- **Version a:** Fully functional and stable. Designed for normal survival gameplay.
- **Version b:** Includes all features from Version a, along with experimental content that is currently in development and may be unstable or not fully accessible.
### Feature Migration and Version Releases
1) Features from Version b may be moved to Version a once they are polished and stable.
2) Some experimental features may be removed if they don’t work as intended.
3) If only one version is available, it means no experimental features are currently in development.
## Showcase World
A custom [playground world](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GkWJPV8aapZpL_mrfqmnUAphM_UQr-D4/view?usp=drive_link) is available to demonstrate the mod’s features.
This world is designed to integrate with the mod and highlight its mechanics.
**Note:**
- The world is still in development.
- Some features may be incomplete or behave unexpectedly.
- Feedback is highly appreciated!

# 0.3.0 Structure Update
comming soon (No Time is known)
- Rewamp of most Structures
- Fixing spawning of some structures
- adding and removing recipies
- rewamp config files
- and much more to come

## 1.21.5+
As Minecraft is now ramping up, the versioning of my mod, becomes more, and more difficult to keep up.
So for the foreseeable future this mod gets the next update in the version 1.21.10 or higher.
